message:
perf(base64): add native Buffer base64 encode/decode (811x faster)

- Add getBufferBytes() helper for typed array/buffer access
- Add bufferToBase64() and bufferFromBase64() using std.base64
- Register native functions in _modules._nativeBuffer
- Update Buffer.from(str, 'base64') to use native when available
- Update Buffer.toString('base64') to use native when available
